arts.ttl: John Egan explains Hull City move after Burnley deadline day departure is confirmed
arts.sum: John Egan’s deadline day move to Burnley’s fellow Championship side Hull City has now been confirmed

arts.ttl: Former Sheffield United star joins Hull City in late transfer deadline day deal
arts.sum: The Republic of Ireland international and United skipper picked up an Achilles injury at West Ham in October 2023, which ended his season prematurely and came as a huge blow to Chris Wilder's Blades last term, who went on to get relegated from the top-flight, and after moving to Turf Moor in the summer following his departure from the Steel City, Egan has played only seven times under Scott Parker. Throughout what has been a hugely disappointing campaign, City have struggled defensively, and while they've kept three clean sheets in their last three away wins, including that thumping 3-0 success at Egan's former club last Friday night, Saturday's 2-1 home loss to Stoke City exposed their weaknesses, especially at home, and Selles will hope Egan's arrival can help cut out those errors which have blighted their campaign.

arts.sum: Burnley have become the social media masters when it comes to player announcements and the Clarets continue to deliver top-tier content. Long gone are the days of simple images of a player in their new club’s colours and Burnley have taken innovative announcements to the next level.
